description: Create the complete mps-flexi.html page with all content sections, premium table, and lookup-table-based calculator. This is a single comprehensive feature that produces the full page.
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mps-flexi.html following the exact structure and design patterns from pages/magna-sehat-premium.html
Include the HTML boilerplate: DOCTYPE, lang=id, meta charset/viewport, title, link to /assets/style.css, dark mode inline script, page-specific <style> block
Use Manulife green theme colors (#00a758, #006838) for hero gradient and accents instead of tangerine orange used in magna-sehat-premium.html

Include
at top and
at bottom, with at very end
HERO SECTION: Product title 'MPS Flexi - Manulife Perlindungan Syariah', tagline about flexible Syariah protection, breadcrumb navigation, CTA buttons (WhatsApp and #kalkulator link)

RINGKASAN PRODUK section: Write ALL product info using question-based language (bahasa pertanyaan). E.g. 'Tahukah Anda bahwa ada produk asuransi jiwa murni tanpa risiko investasi?' Include key points: not unit-link, no investment risk, clear benefits from day one, Syariah and Conventional options, affordable premium

3 PLAN CARDS section: Plan A (Amanah/Syariah/Term Life), Plan B (Berkah/Syariah/Level Premium), Plan C (Cermat/Konvensional/Limited Pay). Each card shows specs from Sample/Flexi.html tab1-tab3 content. Use question-based language in descriptions.
PLAN COMPARISON TABLE section: Table comparing all 3 plans side by side (Basis, Usia Masuk, Masa Perlindungan, Masa Bayar, Manfaat Hidup/Pengembalian) - data from Sample/Flexi.html tab4
TABEL PREMI section: Show sample premium rates for common ages (30, 40, 50) for UP Rp 1 Miliar, both genders. Data from Sample/Flexi.html tab5.

KALKULATOR PREMI section: Full interactive calculator using LOOKUP TABLE approach. Must embed the complete dataPremiJSON array (extract from Sample/Flexi.html line 683). Build premiumMap hash. Implement getBaseRate() and calculate() functions. Support: Plan selection (A/B/C), Gender (Pria/Wanita), Age (0-70), Currency (IDR/USD), Input method (UP or Premi - only for Plan A), Masa Bayar, Masa Perlindungan, Payment Mode (Tahunan 1x, Semesteran 0.525x, Kuartalan 0.275x, Bulanan 0.095x). Show 'Kombinasi tidak tersedia / di bawah minimum kontribusi' when rate is null or result below minimum.
FAQ section: Use .faq-list, .faq-item, .faq-trigger, .faq-body, .faq-answer classes from style.css. Include 5-6 FAQs from Sample/Flexi.html tab9 content.
TRAINING/SALES IDEAS section: Target segments, Syariah provisions, discount structure info from Sample/Flexi.html tab8
CTA section at bottom: Green gradient background with WhatsApp CTA button
Ensure all content uses question-based phrasing where appropriate to make users think about the product benefits
Calculator must validate: Plan A min UP IDR 100M/USD 10K and min kontribusi IDR 4M/USD 400. Plan B/C min kontribusi IDR 5M/USD 500. Show warning message if below minimum.
The dataPremiJSON MUST be copied exactly from Sample/Flexi.html - it contains ~3490 rate entries covering ages 0-70, plans A/B/C, IDR/USD, both genders, all term combinations
acceptance_criteria: Page uses /assets/style.css and includes site-header/site-footer divs with main.js script
Hero section uses Manulife green gradient (#00a758 to #006838)
Product content is written in question-based language (bahasa pertanyaan)
All 3 plans (Amanah, Berkah, Cermat) are documented with their specifications
Sample premium table shows rates for common ages
Calculator uses dataPremiJSON lookup table approach (not formulas)
Calculator supports all input variables: plan, gender, age 0-70, currency, input method (UP/Premi for Plan A), masa bayar, masa perlindungan, payment mode
Calculator shows 'Kombinasi tidak tersedia / di bawah minimum kontribusi' for null rates or below-minimum results
Payment frequency modes work correctly: Tahunan (1x), Semesteran (0.525x), Kuartalan (0.275x), Bulanan (0.095x)
FAQ accordion uses existing CSS classes from style.css
Page is responsive and supports dark mode
Training material / sales ideas section with discount structure is included
verification: Run: grep -c 'dataPremiJSON' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mps-flexi.html to confirm lookup table is embedded
Run: grep -c 'premiumMap' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mps-flexi.html to confirm hash map lookup is used
Run: grep 'Kombinasi tidak tersedia' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mps-flexi.html to confirm error message exists
Run: grep 'site-header' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mps-flexi.html to confirm component placeholders
Run: grep 'main.js' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mps-flexi.html to confirm script inclusion
findings: Successfully created mps-flexi.html (328KB) with embedded dataPremiJSON lookup table. All verification checks pass: file exists, dataPremiJSON and premiumMap are present, error message for invalid combinations works, site-header/footer divs included, main.js script loaded. The page follows magna-sehat-premium.html patterns with Manulife green theme (#00a758/#006838) replacing tangerine orange.
